params.name: World Bowl
params.source:
* Club Chest (1.5%), Expert Scrolls (7.6%), Fragment Crafting (31%), Lottery Machine (0.66%), Wishing (2.8%)
* [[Club#Star_Coins|Club Shop]] 1 Time Purchase of +40 Fragments for 3k Star Coins
params.description:
On Feb 8, 2018, a significant football trophy was given.

On this day, inside the screen, Lloris, the captain of the French national team was holding a World Bowl Trophy made of pure gold and turquoise. He waved to the camera right after his team was awarded the highest honor in the football world. However, they could only bring home a replica of the trophy as the original must be returned to the International Football Federation. The champion of the year can have the trophy until the next World …
